name: Buraikan
description:
Name

武雷管 (ぶらいかん) / Buraikan

Character Designer

Suou (スオウ)

Team Colors

Main

#A38F3C (Burnished Gold)

Sub

#000000

Introduction

Legendary Hiphop Unit who founded the Phantom Lives.

(Translated by @nikkitranslates)

They were widely successful, placing on hit charts all over the world in only about a one year after their debut, with total sales of more than 20 billion copies. They performed in many unique places worldwide and are the hailed as the kings of hip-hop.[1]

Members

  • Chisei Kuzuryu

  • Haruomi Shingu

Songs

  • BURAIKAN is Back

  • Road to Legend

  • DO or DIE

  • Every Day Every Night

  • Let It Heat

  • Trauma

  • FRONTIER

  • Unlike the other units who has their own individual Twitter account, Buraikan shares one as a group, @_BURAIKAN_.

  • The word Buraikan (武雷管) has no special meaning together,. but each of the kanji separately means (武) "military arts", (雷) "lightning/thunder", and (管) "pipe/tube".
